title: Google introduces a Gemini-first Google Home Speaker
friendlyTitle: Google’s new smart speaker is built around Gemini
summary: Google announced a $99.99 Google Home Speaker built for Gemini for Home, with preorders open and retail availability planned for June 25. The device supports more natural smart-home commands, multi-step requests, mid-sentence corrections, Continued Conversation, and optional Google Home Premium features such as Gemini Live and camera history search.
friendlySummary: Google announced a new Home Speaker that can understand more natural voice commands, handle follow-up questions, and control smart-home devices with Gemini.
whyItMatters: Smart speakers have long been useful but rigid; Gemini could make home automation feel more conversational and forgiving. The catch is that some advanced features sit behind a subscription, so households will need to judge whether the convenience is worth the recurring cost.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make home voice assistants easier to use, especially for multi-step requests, but some features may require a paid plan.
